title: Email composition
description: Full email — greeting, body, signature, sign-off
text: Hi Alex, I hope you're well. Can we meet at 2:30 PM tomorrow? I'd like to discuss the Q3 plan. Best regards, Sam Smith sam@team.co
tips: Capital letters at sentence start (Shift + letter)
Standard email structure: greeting, body, sign-off, name, contact

character_tips.anna: Email is everyday writing — practice this and your work emails fly.
character_tips.maxim: Professional emails: clear, structured, short. This is daily output.
character_tips.klavochka: Beautiful messages to friends and colleagues 💌
